skills.summary: Product and project framing workflow for ideas before plan review.
skills.notes: Adapts YC-style office-hours questioning into a concise Codex-native discovery workflow with startup and builder modes.

skills.summary: Founder-style plan review ported into concise Codex skill form.
skills.notes: Preserves the three upstream review modes with Codex-native questioning rules.

skills.summary: Engineering execution review and architecture hardening.
skills.notes: Preserves scope challenge and section-by-section execution review.

skills.summary: Automatic planning pipeline over the current Codex port surface.
skills.notes: Runs office-hours when needed, then consolidates CEO and engineering review while calling out missing design and DX coverage explicitly.

skills.summary: Pre-landing PR review with structural issue detection.
skills.notes: Ports the two-pass review flow and optional Greptile triage into Codex review conventions.

skills.summary: Release engineer workflow for sync, test, push, and PR creation.
skills.notes: Keeps the release orchestration while making versioning and changelog steps conditional.

skills.summary: Browser-driven QA and exploration workflow.
skills.notes: Workflow ported fully; runtime parity depends on available Codex or repo-local browser tooling; refreshed in the June 26 runtime deepening pass.

skills.summary: Root-cause-first debugging workflow.
skills.notes: Ports the upstream investigate discipline into a Codex-native investigate-analyze-hypothesize-implement loop with a no-blind-fixes guardrail.

skills.summary: Systematic diff-aware QA workflow.
skills.notes: QA modes, issue taxonomy, and report template are ported; execution relies on browser tooling.

skills.summary: Report-only QA workflow with no code changes.
skills.notes: Reuses the QA taxonomy and report structure while explicitly forbidding code edits or opportunistic fixes.

skills.summary: Browser session and cookie import workflow.
skills.notes: Preserves the authenticated-session workflow with explicit fallback options; refreshed in the June 26 runtime deepening pass.

skills.summary: Team-aware engineering retrospective workflow.
skills.notes: Preserves time-window parsing, metrics, compare mode, and persistent-history expectations.

skills.summary: Pre-implementation design review for planned user-facing work.
skills.notes: Adapts the upstream design-plan critique into a concise Codex workflow that improves hierarchy, flow, and interaction quality before implementation.

skills.summary: Pre-implementation developer-experience review for developer-facing plans.
skills.notes: Ports the upstream DevEx planning lens into a Codex workflow around onboarding, time-to-value, and friction reduction.

skills.summary: Live design audit and polish workflow for implemented UI.
skills.notes: Uses the best available evidence path to find visual or interaction issues, then fixes them or reports them explicitly.

skills.summary: Live developer-experience audit for docs, setup, and onboarding.
skills.notes: Adapts the upstream DX audit into a Codex workflow that measures real onboarding friction and evidence-backed setup problems.

skills.summary: Design-system and visual-direction consultation workflow.
skills.notes: Ports upstream design-system direction setting into a Codex-native process for defining aesthetic, typography, color, spacing, and motion.

skills.summary: Rapid multi-variant design exploration workflow.
skills.notes: Creates several distinct design directions and iterates on taste feedback without pretending minor color swaps are real exploration.

skills.summary: Design-to-implementation workflow for real UI code.
skills.notes: Turns an approved design direction into framework-native UI while staying responsive, content-aware, and production-minded.

skills.summary: Post-ship documentation sync workflow.
skills.notes: Updates only the docs affected by shipped changes and can save a durable release artifact through the reports pattern.

skills.summary: Deployment-configuration capture for later automated release work.
skills.notes: Makes the repo's production URL, deploy path, and health checks explicit before land-and-deploy runs.

skills.summary: Merge-and-verify release workflow through production checks.
skills.notes: Adapts landing and deploy verification into a Codex workflow that stops on failed CI, bad deploys, or unverified production health.

skills.summary: Performance baseline and regression workflow.
skills.notes: Captures the best available load-time and resource-size signals and can save comparable benchmark reports over time.

skills.summary: Post-deploy live monitoring workflow.
skills.notes: Watches the most important live signals after deployment and can hand recurring checks off to cron-scheduler.

skills.summary: Security audit workflow with concrete exploit-oriented findings.
skills.notes: Ports the upstream CSO role into a Codex-native audit over trust boundaries, secret handling, supply chain, and deploy risk.

skills.summary: Codebase health-check workflow across real repo signals.
skills.notes: Reuses testing and maintenance patterns to summarize the most important repo health signals without fake precision.

skills.summary: Project-learning management workflow.
skills.notes: Keeps reusable project lessons in the repo's durable brain, reporting, and signal-capture patterns instead of a separate opaque memory layer.

skills.summary: Save-and-resume workflow for durable working-state checkpoints.
skills.notes: Uses timestamped reports or equivalent durable artifacts to capture branch state, open questions, and next actions for clean resumption.

skills.summary: Destructive-action guardrail workflow.
skills.notes: Warns before risky actions and pushes the user toward reversible changes wherever possible.

skills.summary: Edit-scope boundary workflow for focused changes.
skills.notes: Keeps edits inside an explicit path boundary until the user widens it or invokes unfreeze.

skills.summary: Combined safety and scope-boundary workflow.
skills.notes: Applies the destructive-action discipline from careful together with the edit boundary from freeze.

skills.summary: Boundary-clearing workflow after freeze.
skills.notes: Clears or widens the prior edit boundary explicitly so the current scope is no longer ambiguous.

skills.summary: Repo and local-skill update workflow for this Codex port package.
skills.notes: Refreshes the checkout or local install, then revalidates so upgrades are explicit and trustworthy; refreshed for the June 26 Codex host audit.

skills.summary: Independent second-opinion workflow.
skills.notes: Provides review, challenge, and consult modes as a deliberate second-pass analysis pattern inside the Codex environment.

skills.summary: Multi-agent collaboration workflow for paired execution.
skills.notes: Adapts shared-browser and paired-agent coordination into a Codex-native ownership and runtime-coordination workflow.

skills.summary: Visible-browser launch workflow.
skills.notes: Uses the best available browser runtime for a headed session and stays explicit about runtime limitations; refreshed in the June 26 runtime deepening pass.

skills.summary: Compatibility wrapper for visible browser attachment.
skills.notes: Treats connect-chrome requests as open-gstack-browser requests while staying honest about the actual runtime path available in Codex.

skills.summary: Planning-preference tuning workflow.
skills.notes: Captures recurring planning preferences around questions, explanation style, and scope choices as durable notes for future planning runs.

skills.summary: Set up or verify the GBrain-style local memory substrate for this Codex port.
skills.notes: Adapts upstream GStack's GBrain setup flow around the existing file-backed local brain substrate, while detecting real upstream gbrain CLI availability when present; refreshed for the June 26 Codex host audit.

skills.summary: Re-index and refresh this repo's GBrain-style local memory guidance.
skills.notes: Maps upstream sync behavior to repo-local brain checks, search verification, and non-destructive handling of untracked brain corpus files; refreshed for the June 26 Codex host audit.

skills.summary: Save working context, decisions, git state, and next steps for future sessions.
skills.notes: Ports the upstream replacement for checkpoint while keeping the existing checkpoint skill as a compatibility wrapper.

skills.summary: Restore saved context and orient a new Codex session before continuing work.
skills.notes: Adds the current upstream resume name while preserving guardrails around dirty worktrees and user-owned untracked files.

skills.summary: Generate or refresh missing project documentation using a Diataxis-style split.
skills.notes: Complements document-release by creating documentation from code evidence before release-facing docs are checked.

skills.summary: Cross-model benchmark workflow for prompts, skills, and tasks.
skills.notes: Adapts upstream model comparison to whichever model CLIs or Codex paths are actually available locally, with no invented metrics.

skills.summary: Remove GStack iOS debug bridge artifacts from an iOS app.
skills.notes: Ports the cleanup workflow with explicit guardrails around generated bridge files versus app-owned code.

skills.summary: Visual design audit workflow for iOS apps.
skills.notes: Adapts real-device upstream review to available simulator or device evidence and Apple-platform tooling.

skills.summary: Evidence-first iOS bug fixing workflow.
skills.notes: Ports the find-fix-verify loop while requiring reproducible evidence and available Apple build tooling.

skills.summary: Structured QA workflow for iOS apps.
skills.notes: Adapts live-device QA to Codex, XcodeBuildMCP, simulator, or device capabilities and distinguishes actual coverage.

skills.summary: Refresh GStack iOS debug bridge artifacts.
skills.notes: Ports bridge regeneration with careful boundaries around generated debug files and production app code.

skills.summary: Read-only landing queue and release slot report.
skills.notes: Adapts workspace-aware landing status into a non-mutating Codex report over local git and available GitHub state.

skills.summary: Convert markdown or brain pages into polished PDFs.
skills.notes: Uses upstream make-pdf when installed and otherwise routes through available local document tooling without mutating source markdown.

skills.summary: Read-only structured data extraction from web pages.
skills.notes: Ports the prototype-first scrape workflow into Codex browser/web tooling, with skillify handoff for repeated flows.

skills.summary: Codify a proven workflow or scrape into a durable skill.
skills.notes: Combines upstream GStack scrape codification with the GBrain meta-skill pattern for this repo.

skills.summary: Root router for the GStack skill suite adapted to Codex skill dispatch.
skills.notes: Ports the upstream root router intent while dropping Claude-specific preambles, telemetry, and skill path checks.

skills.summary: Diagram generation workflow for architecture, flows, and editable diagram sources.

skills.summary: Spec and issue-writing workflow for turning vague intent into executable implementation briefs.
